goals.description: Submit the analysis section draft by 18:00 to secure full credit and shut up Professor prof_assignment before they can nitpick my competence.
goals.rationale: Academic value (0.5) is my god right now; I need that A+ more than I need social validation. If I miss this, I look weak, and weakness is unacceptable.

goals.rationale: I hate being isolated, but my impulsive brain needs a win state first. Eating now while stressed will just make me anxious; I'll do it as a reward for proving I'm capable.
